metadata.title: MailKit — Email on your domain in 5 minutes
metadata.description: Skip 30 minutes of DNS hell. Automated Cloudflare + Brevo setup with guided Gmail Send-As. $5 per mailbox.

hero.title: Email on your domain in 5 minutes
hero.subtitle: Connect your domain and Gmail — we handle Cloudflare Email Routing, Brevo SMTP, and guide you through Gmail Send-As. No 30-minute DNS hell.
hero.honest: We automate 100% of the technical complexity. You do 3 simple copy-paste actions.
hero.guarantee: Money-back guarantee if it takes longer than 5 minutes.

waitlist.success: You're on the list — we'll email you at launch.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

setup.title: Connect your domain
setup.subtitle: Three steps: paste your Cloudflare token, pick the zone, watch us wire it up.

step1.title: Step 1 — Paste your Cloudflare API token
step1.tokenHelp: Create at https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens — template Custom token, scopes: Zone:DNS:Edit, Zone:Zone:Edit, Zone:Zone Settings:Edit, Account:Email Routing Addresses:Edit, Account:Email Routing Rules:Edit. Bind to the specific zone, not all zones.

step2.title: Step 2 — Pick the zone and mailbox
step2.mailboxHint: This becomes {local}@your-domain — lowercase letters, digits, dot, dash, underscore.

awaitingVerify.title: Check your Gmail inbox
awaitingVerify.body: Cloudflare sent a verification link to {email}. Click it, then retry.

done.title: Cloudflare is ready
done.body: Your domain now routes {mailbox}@{domain} to Gmail. Next up: Brevo SMTP — coming in Ticket #4b.

failed.title: Setup failed
failed.body: We couldn't finish the Cloudflare step. Fix the issue below and restart from Step 1.

errors.invalid_token: The API token is invalid or missing required permissions.
errors.zone_not_found: Zone not found in your Cloudflare account.
errors.dns_rejected: Cloudflare rejected a DNS record. Details: {details}
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
errors.cloudflare_unavailable: Cloudflare is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.no_primary_email: Your Google account email is missing — sign out and sign back in.
errors.run_wrong_state: This setup run is not in the right state for this action.
errors.run_corrupt: Setup run is missing required data; start a new one.
errors.db_insert_failed: Could not record the setup run. Try again.
errors.brevo_invalid_token: Brevo rejected our API key. Hold tight while we rotate it — nothing for you to do.
errors.brevo_domain_taken: Brevo already knows this domain from a previous run — we picked up the existing setup.
errors.brevo_rate_limited: Brevo throttled our requests. Retrying shortly.
errors.brevo_unavailable: Brevo is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.brevo_verify_timeout: Brevo could not verify your domain yet. DNS propagation can take a few minutes — retry soon.
errors.spf_conflict: Your SPF record ends in -all (strict policy). Soften it to ~all so Brevo can send on your behalf, then retry.
errors.dns_write_failed: We could not write a DNS record cleanly. Details: {details}

brevoSteps.dns: Brevo DNS records written (DKIM, brevo-code, SPF merged, DMARC)

footer.tagline: Email setup without the DNS nightmare.
